summary: PR #2274 matched the visual-effects units eflib, new eflib_alloc, and ef_061D, while explicitly leaving efsync and efasync for later work. The slice shows large rewrites in eflib.c and a new implementation of ef_061D.c, plus split/symbol/config updates that mark eflib_alloc.c, eflib.c, and ef_061D.c as Matching. Bot output reported +24,216 matched-code bytes and 45 new matches, with one small efasync unmatched-item regression.

key_files.role: Primary matched eflib implementation; largest source rewrite in the PR.
evidence_refs: bot_report: multiple main/melee/ef/eflib functions and data entries reached 100%

key_files.role: New implementation of ef_80061D70 and related ef_061D content.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: adds ef_80061D70 with switch over gfx_id and EF061D_VA_ARG macro
splits.txt diff: adds melee/ef/eflib_alloc.c .bss start 0x80458EB0 end 0x80458EDC

key_files.role: Split-boundary updates for eflib_alloc, eflib, ef_061D, and efasync bss/data/sdata/sdata2 ranges.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: adds eflib_alloc.c .bss and adjusts eflib.c, ef_061D.c, efasync.c ranges

key_files.role: Symbol rename, scope, size, and section metadata updates supporting the matched effect work.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: Effect_AllocData renamed efLib_AllocData with size 0x2C
diff_excerpt: multiple efLib/ef local string and float symbols changed from global to local

key_files.role: Marks eflib_alloc.c, eflib.c, and ef_061D.c as Matching in the ef library configuration.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: Object(NonMatching, "melee/ef/eflib.c") replaced with Matching entries
diff_excerpt: ef_061D.c changed from NonMatching to Matching

key_files.role: Updates allocation limiter callsites to include eflib_alloc.h and use efLib_AllocData.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: Effect_AllocData uses changed to efLib_AllocData

key_files.role: Header surface adjusted for eflib changes.
New header for effect allocation data/API exposure.
evidence_refs: dballoc.c diff: included by dballoc.c for efLib_AllocData

key_files.role: New header associated with ef_061D implementation.
Secondary effect async adjustments despite PR body saying further efasync work would be separate.
evidence_refs: bot_report: one regression in main/melee/ef/efasync efAsync_80063930, -22 bytes

key_files.role: Baselib particle structure/header changes used by the effect matching work.

what_changed: Matched eflib, eflib_alloc, and ef_061D according to the PR body and configure.py diff.
Added a new eflib_alloc.c split for .bss 0x80458EB0-0x80458EDC and marked it Matching.
Converted ef_061D.c from effectively empty to a 518-line implementation containing ef_80061D70 and a large gfx_id switch.
Adjusted GALE01 split ranges for eflib.c, ef_061D.c, and efasync.c data/bss/sdata/sdata2 ownership.
Renamed allocation and effect symbols including Effect_AllocData to efLib_AllocData, Effect_RemoveUserData to efLib_RemoveUserData, and fn_8005C904 to efLib_RenderCallback.
Changed many efLib and ef data/sdata/sdata2 symbols from global scope to local scope in symbols.txt.
Updated dballoc.c to include eflib_alloc.h and use efLib_AllocData for allocation limiter calls.
Touched efsync/efasync and sysdolphin particle/psappsrt headers and source, but the PR text says efsync/efasync matching work was intended for a different PR.
smart_moves: Separated effect allocator storage into its own eflib_alloc.c split instead of leaving the allocator bss inside eflib.c.
Updated configure.py to reflect the newly matched object status for the exact matched units.
Updated callsites and headers after renaming Effect_AllocData to efLib_AllocData, reducing stale symbol use in dballoc.c.
Used symbols.txt scope/size adjustments alongside split range edits, keeping section metadata aligned with the new matched units.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a matched code PR extracts a new translation-unit-level allocation object, update splits, symbols, headers, and consumers together so callsites use the new owning header/name.
evidence_refs: dballoc.c diff: include eflib_alloc.h and use efLib_AllocData

decomp_lessons.lesson: Section ownership work can be part of landing code matches: this PR adjusted split boundaries and local/global symbol scopes for data, sdata, and sdata2 while matching eflib and ef_061D.
evidence_refs: splits.txt diff: eflib.c and ef_061D.c data/sdata/sdata2 range changes
symbols.txt diff: efLib and ef data/sdata/sdata2 symbols changed from global to local

decomp_lessons.lesson: A large dispatcher-like effect function may match as one switch-based function over effect IDs, with varargs extraction helpers and effect constructor calls, but generated-looking macros/tactics should remain evidence-bound.

naming_conventions.convention: Effect library symbols in this slice use the efLib_ prefix for eflib-owned functions and allocator data.
Allocation-data globals are named with subsystem ownership plus AllocData where supported by the split/symbol metadata.
Unproven local data symbols may remain address-style and local-scoped rather than receiving semantic names.
evidence_refs: symbols.txt diff: many efLib/ef data symbols set to scope:local while keeping address-style names

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use configure.py Object(Matching, ...) only after the matched units are ready to be counted as matching.
evidence_refs: configure.py diff: eflib_alloc.c, eflib.c, and ef_061D.c are marked Matching
bot_report: matching gains for eflib, eflib_alloc, and ef_061D

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Keep split ranges and symbol metadata synchronized with newly matched data ownership.
evidence_refs: splits.txt diff: adjusted eflib/ef_061D/efasync section ranges
symbols.txt diff: size/scope changes for data, sdata, sdata2, and bss entries

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: For ef_061D varargs dispatch, the diff uses a local EF061D_VA_ARG macro and a large switch over gfx_id.
PAD_STACK was present in ef_061D.c and appears associated with matching ef_80061D70, but the slice does not include author explanation for why it was necessary.

No review comments or review bodies were loaded for this slice.

follow_up_queries: PR 2274 eflib data sdata2 local scope symbols

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR number/title/state/author/timestamps and changed-file list
human_pr_text: author states matched eflib, new eflib_alloc, and ef_061D
diff_excerpt/raw_diff: split, symbol, configure.py, dballoc.c, and ef_061D.c excerpts
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report with matching metrics and regression note
notes: Raw diff and raw PR JSON are truncated in loaded_files, so file-level details outside the excerpt are summarized from changed-file metadata rather than exact diff content.
There are no loaded review comments; reviewer intent cannot be inferred.
The bot report provides validation-style evidence for new matches and one regression, but the intake did not run builds or objdiff.
The author's 'womp womp, will fix tomorrow' comment is ambiguous; no specific issue should be attributed from it.
ef_061D.c contains an explicit 'WIP CLEAN THIS UP AND SYNC' comment in the diff excerpt, so cleanliness should not be overclaimed even though the bot report shows matching progress.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Allocator split matching requires synchronized split, symbol, header, and consumer updates
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2274, eflib_alloc was introduced as a new matching object with its own .bss split, efLib_AllocData symbol metadata, eflib_alloc.h exposure, and dballoc.c consumer updates.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Section metadata changes were coupled to effect code matches
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2274 matched eflib and ef_061D while updating split ranges and symbol scope/size metadata for effect data, sdata, sdata2, and bss entries.
evidence_refs: splits.txt diff: eflib.c and ef_061D.c section range changes
symbols.txt diff: efLib/ef local scope and size changes
bot_report: eflib and ef_061D data sections reached 100%

source_update_candidates.title: eflib_alloc.c owns efLib_AllocData bss split after PR #2274
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2274 added melee/ef/eflib_alloc.c with .bss start 0x80458EB0 end 0x80458EDC and renamed Effect_AllocData to efLib_AllocData size 0x2C.
evidence_refs: splits.txt diff: adds melee/ef/eflib_alloc.c .bss start:0x80458EB0 end:0x80458EDC
source_update_candidates.reason: Likely durable path/section ownership fact, but curator should verify against current source before promoting.

source_update_candidates.title: PR #2274 marked eflib.c, ef_061D.c, and eflib_alloc.c as Matching
source_update_candidates.text: configure.py changed the ef visual-effects object list to mark eflib_alloc.c, eflib.c, and ef_061D.c as Matching while leaving efsync.c and efasync.c NonMatching.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential source/path status fact; verify current configure state before updating any source corpus.

source_update_candidates.title: PAD_STACK in matched dispatcher functions needs explicit evidence if retained
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2274's ef_061D dispatcher uses PAD_STACK(80) and the bot report shows ef_80061D70 matching, but the slice lacks author explanation for why PAD_STACK was necessary. This supports keeping PAD_STACK evidence-bound rather than treating it as normal style.
source_update_candidates.reason: This reinforces an existing standard rather than proving a new global rule; curator may decide no update is needed.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that the author intentionally accepted the efasync regression; the only loaded human follow-up is ambiguous.
Do not promote all efLib/ef data scope changes as universal naming rules; they are section metadata changes in this PR slice.
Do not treat PAD_STACK(80) or EF061D_VA_ARG as broadly recommended style; they are observed tactics in one matched function with limited explanation.
Do not claim efsync or efasync were matched in this PR; the PR body says those were being worked on for a different PR, and configure.py leaves them NonMatching.
